arts.ttl: Ipswich Town vs Tottenham Premier League clash predicted with unlikely hero
arts.sum: James Maddison scored the only goal of the game as Spurs beat Manchester United 1-0 in their last outing, taking Ange Postecoglou's side up to 12th in the Premier League table. Tottenham will be looking to win three Premier League games in a row for the first time this season when they take on Ipswich Town this afternoon.

arts.ttl: Spurs 'tell broadcasters NOT to call them Tottenham in remarkable memo to Premier League partners'
arts.sum: A subtle change in the naming conventions of the north London club was spotted by eagle-eyed viewers of Sky Sport's coverage of the side's 1-0 win over Manchester United last Sunday.

arts.ttl: 'He’s the one': Ange Postecoglou says he's 'genuinely excited' about a young player at Spurs who's barely played
arts.sum: This boy is going to become a star!

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Tottenham intend to table offers for 20-year-old Corinthians player
arts.sum: Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur have Corinthians’ Breno Bidon in their target list for the summer window. That’s according to Bolavip Brasil, and they state Arsenal and Tottenham are interested in signing the 20-year-old. He spent five years at Corinthians’ youth system before being promoted to the first team in 2024. arts.sum: It’s not been the best of seasons for either Tottenham or Wolves, with the former set to embarrass the latter with their pursuit of Matheus Cunha. arts.ttl: Tottenham loan star on following Harry Kane's lead at Leyton Orient and dream Man City goal
arts.sum: Tottenham legend Harry Kane was Jamie Donley's boyhood idol growing up and now the talented young attacking midfielder is following in his footsteps by shining on loan at Leyton Orient
